name: chr19_19q13_32_KIR_xref
description: Cross-reference stub for the killer-cell immunoglobulin-like receptor (KIR) gene cluster at 19q13.42 (sometimes cited as 19q13.32 in older literature). The full KIR locus description lives in ../kir/KIR_locus_chr19.json; this entry exists only so the SD inventory enumerates the locus.

architecture.internal_structure: See ../kir/KIR_locus_chr19.json — ~14 KIR paralog genes at 85-98% identity, A and B haplotypes, flanking SDs mediate frequent gene-content variation.
